title: Modern Villager House
description: Adds a modern style villager house to the Plains biome
body:
This mod adds a Modern Villager House to the world, featuring various villagers living inside.

![House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce68311fa8c48e87570f2a5d7d149d421cbdde2d.jpeg)

The house is decorated in a stylish, modern design.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48f0f4d1cff708038abbffe3ab65cb0602880543.jpeg)

The Modern Villager House can spawn in Meadow and Flower Plains biomes.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0908ac2597491b916173ecd56503640ce6a94022.jpeg)

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack
